subcodes.first_line: The Best-Beloved of the world speaketh in the Persian tongue. Were His friends also to speak and write in this language, it would be commendable in His sight
subcodes.first_line_orig: محبوب عالم بلسان پارسی تکلم میفرماید دوستان او هم اگر باین لسان تکلم نمایند و بنویسند
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
